message:
test(golden_corpus): add missing API key and whitespace stdin edge-case fixtures

Two new golden corpus fixtures for JSON mode edge cases, following the
pi.golden_corpus.v1 schema:

tests/golden_corpus/json_mode/json_mode_missing_api_key_error.json:
- Exercises the failure path when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty/missing
- Verifies non-zero exit code, no panic in stderr, and no session files created
- Uses --no-tools --no-extensions --no-skills --no-prompt-templates --no-themes
  to isolate the auth failure from other subsystems

tests/golden_corpus/json_mode_stdin/stdin_whitespace_header_only.json:
- Exercises the edge case where stdin contains only whitespace and tabs
- Verifies the whitespace is trimmed away, exit code is 0, no errors/panics,
  only the session header JSON line is emitted (json_line_count: 1,
  json_session_header: true), and no session files are created

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "json_mode_missing_api_key_error",
+  "surface": "json_mode",
+  "description": "JSON mode failure path: missing API key should fail fast with non-zero exit and no panic",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "json",
+    "-p",
+    "--provider", "anthropic",
+    "--model", "claude-sonnet-4-5",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off",
+    "Hello from missing key fixture"
+  ],
+  "stdin": null,
+  "env_overrides": {
+    "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": ""
+  },
+  "cassette": null,
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code_nonzero": true,
+    "stdout_contains": [],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["panic"],
+    "no_session_files": true
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "json_mode_stdin_whitespace_header_only",
+  "surface": "json_mode_stdin",
+  "description": "JSON mode stdin edge case: whitespace-only stdin is trimmed away and emits only session header",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "json",
+    "--provider", "anthropic",
+    "--model", "claude-sonnet-4-5",
+    "--api-key", "test-vcr-key",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off"
+  ],
+  "stdin": "   \n\t\n",
+  "env_overrides": {},
+  "cassette": null,
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code": 0,
+    "stdout_contains": [],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["error", "panic"],
+    "no_session_files": true,
+    "json_line_count": 1,
+    "json_session_header": true
+  }
+}
